reviews.review_msg: Worst professor ever, makes easy concepts extremely hard. Wouldn't recommend him at all
the best!
Beauty.

Whilst he does know what he'd talking about he simply was not cut out to be a teacher. I've never actually had a bad experience with a prof before and this was my last semester. He's very arrogant and has an extremely condescending attitude towards students. The only thing I can say in his favour is that the midterm and final were fair.
studied head off for a decent grade, makes material much harder than it should be, and the language used somewhat mean.

THIS PROFESSOR IS AMAZING. I have no clue why others keep giving him bad grade. He's super nice and very helpful. Worth taking a course with him for sure! If you cannot survive his class you should not be able to call yourself an economics major. He's very easy and very very good!

He is very nice and helpful, if you go to his office, he will be always help you, although the assignments are too difficult,the exams are easier, if you study all the assignments, tutorial question and lecture notes, it would be fine.

worst professor ever seen in sfu, bad attitude toward students, and makes easy material 10 times harder, messy notes with messy organization and often with mistake that he needs to correct in class with his unreadable handwriting

so regard taking with him! He talked too fast during lecture and feels like he is giving lecture to students who do well in the class. When I tried to ask question after class, I confused even more after and he kept saying 'it's all in the note/text'; wtx would I need a instructor if I can fully understand the material by myself...

Materials aren't that hard but he makes things so much harder by using very unreasonable teaching method. Assignments instructions are confusing as hell but he expects students to answer them perfectly just in 200-300 words.
WOW....

Instead of teaching actual material in the course, this power trip spends time plotting way in which to punish students.  The material he does teach is a bunch of formulas with no explanation as to how it relates into developmental economics.

I recommend taking all of your classes with Georgi.  He is a great professor and is not on a power trip at all.  His exams are so easy you can write them with your eyes closed.   This course and professor are definitely a GPA booster.  Best of all, if you miss a class you can teach yourself the material using the $200 textbook he demands you buy.
lecture notes are very disorganized and confusing. The assignments are even worse however graded very strictly
Georgi's lecture notes are pretty straightforward.  Write everything down and do the tutorial assignments, and it all makes sense.  The written assignments take a long time, but this is a W class.
His lecture notes are disorganized and the lecture itself is very confusing. The assignments are even worse however graded very strictly
very confusing lecture,notes are disorganized. assignemnts are even worse and very strictly graded.

This prof completely sucks. First of all, he does not know how to teach. Second, he does not know how to prepare properly. Third, his assignments are so confusing. Fourth, lecture notes are useless. Please think before you take this prof.

Believe you me, stay away from this prof. First he gives a bunch of textbook recommendations, then after people buy them, decides not to use them. You have nothing to fall back on because his teaching abilities are so poor , he tries to punish his students. Makes mistakes all the time, thinks he knows what he's doing but he really doesn't.

He is a nice guy who really cares about his students, but does not posses any ability to teach. The whole class would leave mid way through lecture due to his complicated teaching style. MT was easy, but the final was confusing, as he rushed through many chapters. I would not recommend any student to take this class.
Georgi's lectures are a waste of time, he just goes word for word over the textbook. This class honestly ruined my GPA.

I found this class to be somewhat interesting. Georgi was not the best prof, but the assignments and midterms and even final were relatively easy if you took the time to study and do practice questions. Practice questions and youtube videos really helped! Georgi isn't the best teacher, but is still very fair with exams and work load. Don't complain

Boichev is a nice person no doubt, but his inability to express his thoughts and the materials required in lectures just made our lives so much harder. It is only the 3rd week of the semester, and we are all struggling. DO NOT take this prof unless you want to learn everything by yourself at home.

I found his class very confusing and complicating. I would rad the book before hand and understand everything, but when I go listen to his lectures, I would get confused really easily. He's a nice person, but a bad teacher.

OMG horrible teacher. He's a wonderful person, super nice and friendly, but cannot teach to save his life. He does not explain concepts well, cannot come up with examples to explain what he means, just ends up confusing people more. I do NOT recommend taking this class with him unless you're cool with teaching all the material to yourself.

a 3 hour lecture with this prof was a weekly disaster. Georgi is a very nice guy but his teaching abilities are horrible. exams and midterms are not too bad but if you sign up for this class you have to do a lot of work on your own. would not recommend unless your are a strong independent learner

Basically hes a prof that cant teach but gives moderately easy exams. So you can get a high mark in his class but you'll have to do it though reading the textbook. Not a bad prof bus certainly a boring and dry course! Good luck!

He reads off from the slides so it's completely useless to go to class. He doesn't make the material any interesting, in fact he makes it much more complicating. First time teaching so I can't be too harsh but literally no one knows what is going on in the class. You'll do better learning on your own.

Im glad I took Econ 301 with him too. Great prof. As long as you go to the lectures/totorials and his or the TAs' office hours, you will do fine in the midterms. The final was tricky, but it was a great way distinguish students who understood the material from those who MEMORIZED the practice/problem  sets.

I am glad I took 301 with Georgi last summer. His lectures and notes were clear and useful. He cared a great deal about his students. He would extend his office hours forever until every question was answer. MTs and final were very similar to the practice questions he gave. I don't understand why so many students were complaining. If you got a bad grade, it doesn't mean he is a bad prof. It just means that your learning style needs to be changed.

really nice prof! if you visit him during his office hours, he takes the time to find out your name and everything. it's his first time teaching, so he's not great, but he's the kind of guy who would care enough to improve. i definitely hope to see him around in years to come. go georgi!

He cares about his students. I personally thought his lectures were pretty clear. I was able to understand the material from his lecture notes. It is a must that you spend time reviewing the Problem Sets as they are very similar to the Midterm and Final problems. The final was hella hard. Watch out because easy midterms can mean hard finals.

He is a nice person, but he doesn't have the teaching ability at all!!! He makes too many mistakes all the time. His office hours are useless becuz there is always a huge a line up and even if you get a chance to ask questions, he can't explain clearly. I feel like wasting my tuition on him even though I aced all exams. I didn't learn anything :(

His is a nice prof. His lecture notes is really helpful. If you do all his problem sets,you'll get a good mark in MTs. The final was hard n tricky, but overall was easy. His 301 is much easier than any other prof. Highly recommended to take his class.

Course material a bit too easy and going over them  a bit slowly compared with Bus 207 I took 4 years ago with Matadeen. Notes are ok but its better to have some more quantitative examples. Exams are not too fair as they are too similar to practice questions/problem sets rather than testing students' true understanding of the material...
He was fair on all exams and it was his first time teaching.  I think everyone should cut him some slack; he was really passionate for what he does.

I dont understand y many people said his teaching is good. He is the worst prof i ever had (not himself,just the teaching style). His notes is so confusing, with many useless info but lacking of key explaination. Most time its like he is talking to himself rather than communicating with students.

Intense calculations, but exam format follows strictly with problem sets so you will be fine just by repeating practicing. If the exam tells you to explain using words, USE HIS WORDS. You can get his intepretation off problem sets. Overall he is a good prof and the class avg is high

He really cares his students,especially about those Math stuff. However, it is your responsiblity to preview the text which helps you to detect those mistakes he made on lectures. Most of my friends told me that this course is super hard,but He made it fair to us, at least for Midterm,maybe final will be hard,otherwise 50%over will get A...

I think Georgi is a very good prof. He really understood students struggled with the Math and spent an entire week explaining the Lagrangians in lecture. I agree his exams have the same format but he always puts enough tricks to make sure you understood and  not just memorized his practice exam and problem sets. I learnt a lot in his class.

Midterms are almost identical to the practice midterms. However this guy can't really teach. It seems like he is never prepared for lectures and constantly makes mistakes in the lecture notes. The lecture basically lays down the theory and you learn how to do the calculations in tutorials. It would be helpful if he did more calculations in class

This is my first time taking this class and I think Georgi is a great prof. His practice exams are very similar to the actual ones so if you do the practice ones, you should get a decent mark on the exams. If you stay on top of your work, it's actually not that bad of a class. I find his notes are very helpful as well.

Georgi is not a bad prof. What makes him bad is the fact he constantly makes mistakes in his notes (sometimes im even unsure whether or not what we are learning from his notes are entirely correct). 2nd there are no detailed examples given, so you will struggle with whether u did the math correct or not. MT are always hard. (1st time taking it)

The problem isn't Georgi, the problem is the class itself. ECON 301 is super difficult. Georgi does an excellent job teaching it, especially when compared to Barkin or Lufle. Georgi actually cares about the students and is extremely helpful. As someone who has failed ECON 301 before, believe me when I say Georgi is the best prof for ECON 301.

The worst prof I ever had.  Lecture notes r terrible,even the answer he put online r impossible to read through. He didn't have a organized schedure, so everything is such a mess. I just feel like wasting money entirely....... it's so confusing to listen to him, so tired to copy his notes and so disapponted to see his answers on webct.  Strongly recommand not taking his course
